title: zerna indurata
intro: Zerna indurata, commonly known as Rough Cocklebur, is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. The health benefits of Zerna indurata include its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help in reducing inflammation and protecting against oxidative stress. The therapeutic actions of this plant include its use in traditional medicine for treating various conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin issues. The bioactive constituents of Zerna indurata include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
side_effects: Zerna indurata can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Prolonged use can also lead to kidney damage and increased risk of bleeding due to its high content of saponins. Additionally, improper use of zerna indurata may cause allergic reactions, such as skin rashes, itching, and difficulty breathing. In severe cases, overuse can lead to seizures, coma, and even death.
